description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The structure features a mix of white and natural wood exterior walls, with large windows providing ample natural light. The front includes a driveway with a carport and a separate garage, both accessible from the street. The backyard is enclosed with privacy fencing and contains a patio area, visible greenery, and outdoor seating. The house layout is open, with clear separation between living spaces and private areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring a carport, garage, and private backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, garage, main entry, and lush front landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden privacy fence, side garden, and partial view of the backyard patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, dense trees, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side garden, and rear landscaping with a clear view of the house's flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a simple modern door adjacent to the carport.
